feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cannot able to access the Latest candidate workbench as it shows Applications gave 400 status=400
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are facing the below error while accessing the Latest Candidate workbench for all the Job requisitions.

Below is the error note:
errorMessage=Service /rest/recruiting/application/search/v1/Requisitions/5871/Applications gave 400
status=400
timestamp=2024-10-31T08:34:16.175Z
externalMessage=Translate facet failed. Cannot find solr field for property state.

If anyone else have faced this issue, if so could you please share your solution, it would be really helpful.

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,

Monika C

entry.title: Notification whenever a new position is filled with a new employee/employee master data
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any possibility to create a new notification whenever a new position is filled with a new employee/employee master data. Currently the payroll team informs the creator of the new position (recruiting) by e-mail after they have filled the position with a newly created employee (master data). Is there any possibility to use the completion of the new employee data as trigger for a notification to the creator of the position (recruiting)?

Thank you and regards,

Aneta Krysiak

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Hiding My Teams Position
entry.content:
Hello,

One year ago, we have removed the visibility of Position Orgchart from Managers and moved the management of positions to the HR function. With the last release, My Teams Position tile is available to managers on their owns team under Company Info.

We intended to hide the My Teams position tile from the managers, to avoid confusion and (so that they see in the system only whatever is relevant to them).

We received the response that this is automatically on and can't be controlled separately via RBP.

Did anyone had similar challenge? and found a way to hide My Teams position tile from the Company Info?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Intelligent Services - HR Triggers (IAM Integration)
entry.content:
We are in the process of enabling HR triggers for Hire, Rehire, Termination, Job updates from SuccessFactors to SAP IAG system where the accesses are managed and provisioned centrally. As part of this connectivity  where employees are created from SF to IAG, we need to perform some checks within employee data before we get these events triggered. 

The reasoning behind this is, the username and email ID are updated from AD (Active Directory) Integration into SF after employees is hired, so the HR Triggers should initiate after ensuring the updates from AD into employee profile (username & email). Is there a provision to include this check as part of intelligent services to ensure the HR trigger is initiated only after the email ID & the username are updated in employee profile. Appreciate your input.

entry.title: Planned Working Time
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible that if we have planned working time established for group of the employees for 8:00 AM till 5:00 PM that employees can modify the start time or end time, e.g. for 9:00 AM till 4:00 PM by themselves?

 

Regards,

Aneta Krysiak

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Restriction on Editing Approved Fields in Employee Profile and Workflow Page
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I hope you are doing well.

We have identified an issue with the editing capabilities in the Employee Profile and Workflow Page that needs to be addressed based on the following requirements:

Current Issue:

In the Employee Profile, we are currently able to edit the fields that have already been approved. The desired behavior is:

  • Once a field value is approved by the approver, no one should be able to edit the existing information, either in the Employee Profile or on the Workflow Page.
  • Only new information should be allowed to be added, and HR Admin should be the only role with permission to edit existing values.

Scenario 1:

  • In a specific MDF in the Employee Profile, an employee added new data. Then, on a different date, they added more data again. In this case, the employee is able to edit the previously entered information.
  • Desired behavior: Once the previous field is approved, it should automatically become non-editable and should remain in the Employee Profile as read-only, even if new data is added.

Scenario 2:

  • After an employee adds a new record in the MDF, it goes for approval. In this case, the approver is able to edit the existing record by clicking on the update button.
  • Desired behavior: The approver should only be able to update the new information and should not be able to edit any of the previously approved data.

In the attached screenshot, the colored line is existing information. while adding new data those fields should get non editable.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

entry.title: Restricting Assigned Flat Numbers visibility in MDF Quarter Allotment
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We have a requirement regarding the MDF Quarter Allotment in Employee Central, specifically related to the Flat Number field, which is a picklist value.

Requirement:

  • Once a flat number has been assigned to an employee, it should no longer be visible in the dropdown list for other employees.
  • Only the non-allotted flat numbers should appear in the dropdown for any subsequent users.

Example Scenario:

  • If Flat 103 is assigned to Ramesh, when another employee, Yogesh, goes to the Quarter Allotment Portlet and clicks on the Flat Number dropdown, Flat 103 should not be visible in the list.
  • Yogesh should only see flat numbers that are not already assigned to any employee. so that assigned flat numbers are hidden from the dropdown once they have been allocated.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

entry.title: Request for Birthday Wishes Functionality in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I hope you're doing well.

Currently, in SuccessFactors, only managers are able to view the upcoming birthday notifications of their reportees on the homepage. The requirement is to enhance this functionality by allowing users to send birthday wishes to employees directly from the birthday notification tab by clicking on the appeared link.

Requirement:

  • The Requirement is to add a feature that allows anyone (managers and possibly other users) to send birthday wishes to the employee on their special day, directly by clicking on the birthday notification link in the system.
  • This would make the birthday notification more interactive and help facilitate a more personal and engaging experience for employees.
    Thank you for your attention on this matter.

entry.title: story report not loading after migration to CSD
entry.content:
Hi

We migrated to CSD in our DEV instance this august. Since then we've had problems with Story Reports not loading. This happens both, when we open existing story reports, and when we try to create a new one. We receive no error messages - the story just loads and loads without end, until we give up. 
Some days it works, but most days they don't load.
Does anyone else experioence this? Could this be connected to the migration to CSD? Or would this problem have another cause?

Best regards
Merete Lintrup
HR Systems Manager

entry.title: Date getting stuck in story reports data queries
entry.content:
Hi 

Quite often the dynamic date of 'today' in my story report gets stuck and doesn't refresh every day as expected. 

When I investigate the data query, I confirm that all data tables are filtered to the time setting of - dynamic date - as of today. It is not obvious to me what could cause the date to be getting stuck. 

To fix the issue, I take the filter off and reapply and then the data refreshes to show what I would expect to see. 

This date issue is affecting all story reports but not consistently. Example, one report with dynamic date as today will get stuck but a similar report on the same day will be fine. The reports are all structured in a similar way with most of them beginning with 'Job Information'. 

Please can I get advise on how I can ensure my story reports with dynamic dates do not get stuck ? 

Thanks 
Aisling

entry.title: Recruitment Reporting- Candidate Application Questions and answers
entry.content:
Hi 

I need to report on the candidate application questions and answers.


We can pull the questions from the backend of the system but this does not come with formatting features and therefore the back end report is not suitable for the end user i.e. hiring manager/recruitment team. 

I have referred to KBA 2749268 which advises that two reports need to be downloaded via the Integration Centre and then merged together.

Please provide an update on when the report centre will be able to report on candidate application questions, whether it be a table, canvas or story report ? 

Thanks 
Aisling

entry.title: how to use standard gender field in custom MDF as this is hardcode doesnt have any valid source
entry.content:
Hello All we have requirement where i need  to compare the gender personal info field based on the country from custom MDF.I have created the custom MDF with field gender what could be the valid source for this field so that can compare with standard gender field as the this field is hardcode value derived by the system.

 

Thanks

Sachin

entry.title: Query concerning a release item on Employee Quick Card Deprecation
entry.content:
Hello,

There are two release notes,

WEF-135483 - Replacement of Employee Quickcard with Profile Preview

KM-18640 - Deprecation of Legacy People Profile

As per the notes, Profile Preview is part of the Latest People Profile. If the Legacy People Profile is being  deprecated on 2H 2025, why is the employee quick card being deprecated earlier i.e. on 1H 2025.

Both these items must be deprecated in the same time frame. Please let me know.

Regards.

entry.title: How does IAS System handle the Multiple Employment issue of same Employee ?
entry.content:
There is a employee say "Saif" and he has multiple employement, 

a} He has username as 1100111 and login method as SSO, and unique email.

b} He also has a username as saif@example.com and login method as PWD.

These two scenarios are of the same employee.

But IAS System only captures or syncs the 1100111 value in the IAS System and not the other one, this leads to logging issues.

 

Please suggest details steps to prevent and provide solution to this problem.

entry.title: How to subscribe to SuccessFactors Employee Central via Test, Demo and Development environment
entry.content:
Hi All,

Myself Abdullah Shaik, working for Invenics Services Ltd and there is a POC requirement came to us which is below:

Requirement: Extract the data from SF Employee Central using SAP Datasphere and load it into SAP HANA and generate the reports.

As part of the requirement, we have subscribed to SAP Datasphere using TDD (Test, Demo and Development environment subscription). However, I am not finding the right place to use the same TDD for SuccessFactors. Could you please help with the below queries along with the subscription process to SF EC?

a) How to subscribe to SF Employee Central?

b) As part of the subscription, do we get the Technical user of SF Employee Central?

c) Is there any data already available in the subscription system or do we need to load the data? If so, do we have the right admin access to load the data?

d) Assume that the subscription is done, is SAP going to charge message based triggers or do we have some xxx number of messages free? 

e) Any restriction on the messages processed between the applications/systems?

Best regards,

Abdullah Shaik.

entry.title: SuccessFactors Contingent Workers for Compliance Purposes
entry.content:
hello all, good day, 

Due to the need of segregating all Non Employees in SF instance solely for compliance purpose, we have activated the CW feature in our instance & activated "Is Contingent Worker" flag which is now visible in <Employment Details> portlet as a "Yes/No" field - Without implementing other CW full-suite setup such as configuring new CW Person Type specific business configurations, CW new hire template, Work Order configuration & setup, etc. We only have activated the "Is contingent worker" flag under employment details and nothing else because we only want to use the flag to differentiate regular employees vs non-employees.

Query 1:

Will sole enablement of "Is Contingent Worker" flag Without the full suite CW configuration setup and setting this flag = "Yes" classify these staffs as CW worker & No longer classify as regular staffs?

Query 2:

Is this the same flag that is checked in BIB replication configuration for inclusive / exclusive of Contingent Workers under xxxxxxxxxxxxx in SAP ECC??

Query 3:

will sole enablement of "Is Contingent Worker" flag Without full suite CW configuration setup and setting this flag = "Yes" for the non-employees auto disable all other modules such as time off (leaves application), Timesheet & Payroll as if full suite CW setup are in place?? If No, any other way / configurations / switches to disable unwanted modules not needed for CW workers? If yes, wat are all other modules that will be auto disabled?

Query 4:

With sole enablement of "Is Contingent Worker" flag Without full suite CW configuration setup and setting this flag = "Yes", are employmentInfo & JobInfo are the minimal 2 portlets that must be maintained? any other portlets that are mandatory and must be maintained to ensure proper classification of CW.

Thanks all for your time, Appreciate reading my post.

entry.title: HOD/HR Able to Edit Job Information via Action Button Before Selecting Event/Reason
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a specific requirement from one of our customers.

Currently, HODs and HR are able to modify job information from the Action Button (top left corner) before selecting the event and event reasons. However, once the event and event reasons are chosen, the previously filled fields are being saved.

Issue Details:

  • HODs and HR can update any job information fields via the Action Button before specifying the event and event reasons.
  • After selecting the event and event reasons, the system is saving the changes made earlier, even though this should not occur until the event is confirmed.
  • Our rule specifies that fields should only become visible after the correct event reason is selected.
  • Currently, users can make changes to any fields before selecting the event reason, and these changes are being saved irrespective of the event reason chosen.

Expected Behavior:

  • Job information should only be saved and finalized once the event and event reasons are properly selected and confirmed.
  • Fields should become visible and editable only after the relevant event reason is selected.
  • Changes should be saved only after the correct event reason has been specified and confirmed.

Thank you.

entry.title: Is it possible to send email to business and private emails of employees?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Business request: to send an email that is triggered after the termination of an employee (via workflow)  to both their business (primary) and private email. Is it possible to achieve this?

Thanks a lot,

Anna

entry.title: Manual enrollment of global benefits
entry.content:
Hi,

we have configured pension and insurance benefit plan and has linked to pay components. Employee goes in and manually enrolls to these benefits. Once it is done it the compensation information is not updated with the contribution or allowances like child allowance for which he enrolled manually.#SuccessFactors SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Global Benefits 

Please let me know what could be the issue.

entry.title: ONB: Not able to see the Time management info for Onboardee/inactive Employee
entry.content:
Hi, 

we hired people through ONB, Manage pending hire, they are still inactive employee as their hire date are in the future. but we need to modify the time off data and Time sheet before their arrival.

we modify the As of date in the future (so on their hiring date or later), we go to the Time Management Block and we have  see this (see screen shot 1):

Time Sheet

You are not authorized to access time sheet data or the user does not exist.

Upcoming Time Off

You are not authorized to view time off data.

When we add employee through "add mew employee" and even if their hire date is in the future, we are able to display and modify their Time info. 

we checked the RBP and everything looks ok, so we are not able to fix the issue.

Any advice on this please?

Thanks, 

sevda
